chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Misc.Appln.No.D-04 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 08.02.2022 Mr. Habibullah Ghouri, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Nawaz Ghanghro, Advocate for private respondents. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. = * = * = * = * = * = At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant Crl.Misc.Application before this Court on merits, provided the learned trial Court may be directed to consider joining of let-off accused at trial, on filing of such application by the applicant, after recording his evidence, which is not opposed by learned Addl.P.G for the State and learned counsel for the private respondents. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
